meta.title: Downloader — Fast video downloader
meta.description: Download videos from YouTube and direct links. Choose quality and format in one place.

footer.description: Lightweight video downloader for supported links and formats.

home.title: Downloader
home.description: Paste a video link and choose your preferred quality and format. The system processes the media and prepares it for download. Fast and simple extraction in one place. No extra steps required.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: A quick four-step flow designed to stay simple, even when source links and formats vary.

1.title: Copy your video link
1.description: Use a supported source such as YouTube or a direct MP4/WEBM link.

2.title: Open the downloader tool
2.description: Go to this website and use the downloader section to start processing your media.

3.title: Paste the link
3.description: Paste the video URL into the input field on this page.

4.title: Select options and download
4.description: Choose format and quality options, then start processing and download the final result.

start.title: Start downloading
start.description: Paste your link, choose preferred options, and process the media in one place.

form.title: Download your media
form.description: Paste a YouTube or direct media URL, then choose format and quality.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: You can paste a link, choose format and quality, and download the file.
faq.a3: No, you can use it without registration.
faq.a4: You can usually download in MP4 or MP3.
faq.q5: Can I choose video quality and format?
faq.a5: Yes. You can select the desired quality and output format before downloading.
faq.a6: Yes, it works on most mobile browsers.
faq.q7: Why is my link not working?
faq.a7: The link may be invalid, unsupported, or temporarily unavailable.
faq.a8: Speed depends on the file size and your internet connection.

errors.rateLimited: Too many requests right now. Please try again shortly.
errors.rateLimitedWithSeconds: Too many requests right now. Try again in {seconds} seconds.
errors.badRequest: Request is invalid. Please check the URL and try again.
errors.forbiddenHost: This direct host is blocked by current security policy.
errors.unsupportedSource: This source is unsupported. Use YouTube or a direct media URL.
errors.unsupportedFormat: This format is not available for the selected media.
errors.downloadFailed: We could not process this source right now. Please verify the link and try again.
errors.requestTimeout: The request took too long. Please try again in a few moments.
errors.internalError: Unexpected server error. Please try again later.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check connection and try again.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.p1: This service is provided "as is" for personal and lawful use only.
terms.p2: By using this website, you agree that you are solely responsible for the actions you take and for any content you access, process, or download.
terms.p3: You may only use this service with content that you own, have permission to access, or are legally allowed to use.
terms.p4: We do not store user accounts, personal data, or download history.
terms.p5: We may restrict or block access to the service if we detect abuse, illegal activity, or violation of these terms.
terms.p6: We do not guarantee that the service will always work with all websites, formats, or sources.
terms.p7: Use of this service is at your own risk.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: This service does not require registration and does not collect personal accounts or profiles.
privacy.p2: When you use the service, we may temporarily process the URL you submit in order to provide the requested functionality.
privacy.p3: We may also process basic technical information such as IP address, browser type, and request logs for security and operational purposes.
privacy.p4: We do not sell, share, or use personal data for marketing purposes.
privacy.p5: Temporary processing files may be automatically deleted after completion.
privacy.p6: We do not permanently store user-submitted content or download history.
privacy.p7: You are responsible for ensuring that any content you process complies with applicable laws and rights of third parties.

dmca.title: Copyright & DMCA Policy
dmca.p1: We respect intellectual property rights and comply with valid copyright removal requests.
dmca.p2: If you believe that content processed through this service violates your rights, you may contact us with a description of the issue and relevant details.
dmca.p3: We may investigate and remove access to the reported content or restrict related functionality if necessary.
dmca.p4: We reserve the right to block users who repeatedly violate copyright rules or misuse the service.
